title: rauvolfia semperflorens var. insularis
intro: Rauvolfia semperflorens var. insularis, also known as Rauvolfia or Snake Root, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family that is native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. The medicinal properties of Rauvolfia semperflorens var. insularis include its ability to reduce blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension, epilepsy, and menopausal symptoms, due to its sedative and anticonvulsant properties. Herbal preparations of Rauvolfia semperflorens var. insularis include dried roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal use.
